scripts.build: NODE_ENV=production bunup src/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --no-splitting --external @4lt7ab/core --external react --external react-dom && NODE_ENV=production bun build src/index.ts --format esm --external @4lt7ab/core --external react --external react-dom --outfile dist/index.js && NODE_ENV=production bun build src/index.ts --format cjs --external @4lt7ab/core --external react --external react-dom --outfile dist/index.cjs && sed -i '' 's|from "@4lt7ab/core"|from "../../core/dist/index.js"|g' dist/index.js && sed -i '' 's|require("@4lt7ab/core")|require("../../core/dist/index.cjs")|g' dist/index.cjs
